spec.objective: Add vendor-aware credential dispatch to internal/dispatch/podjob/jobspec.go. Adds a Vendor string field to BuildOptions (empty string defaults to anthropic behavior -- no existing callers broken). When Vendor == openai: credproxy sidecar is omitted (Codex calls the OpenAI API directly; no HMAC proxy needed), the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY signed-token env line is suppressed, and OPENAI_API_KEY is sourced from the injected providerSecretRef envFrom (already available since the operator puts OPENAI_API_KEY in that Secret). When Vendor == anthropic or empty: existing behavior is unchanged. Verification: jobspec_test.go covers anthropic (unchanged) and openai (no credproxy, no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY line, OPENAI_API_KEY present) cases; make test green; verify-import-firewall green (no codex import in jobspec).
